searchLedger.hypothesis: Replay returns stored MCP response without replay metadata mutation

searchActions.result: lookupIdempotencyReceipt returns JSON.parse(row.response_payload) directly at idempotency-receipts.ts:133-137; the prior addReplayMarker path was removed.

searchLedger.rationale: The stored MCP response text payload is preserved through JSON.stringify at idempotency-receipts.ts:164 and JSON.parse on replay, with no replay flag or hint injection.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No replay metadata leak or shape mutation found in the replay path.

searchLedger.hypothesis: receipt_key is a primary key in the receipt schema

searchActions.result: ensureIdempotencyReceiptSchema creates memory_idempotency_receipts with receipt_key TEXT PRIMARY KEY at vector-index-schema.ts:656-669.

searchLedger.rationale: The ON CONFLICT(receipt_key) target has a real primary-key constraint in the schema used by the receipt table.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Receipt-write guard excludes duplicate, unchanged, rejected, error, and non-positive ids

searchActions.result: shouldStoreMemorySaveReceipt requires response.isError !== true, integer id > 0, and status in indexed/updated/deferred at idempotency-receipts.ts:104-113.

searchLedger.rationale: duplicate and unchanged are not in the writable status set, and error responses or id 0 results cannot store receipts.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No over-broad receipt storage found for non-mutating or failed save results.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Normalized-equal payloads replay while changed same-key payloads conflict

searchActions.result: deriveIdempotencyReceiptKey computes receiptKey from operation/contentHash/requestFingerprintHash and separately stores payloadHash at idempotency-receipts.ts:87-101; lookup returns conflict when stored payload_hash differs at idempotency-receipts.ts:130-132.

searchLedger.rationale: Client idempotency token keys and undefined values are normalized out before hashing at idempotency-receipts.ts:59-84, so reordered or token-only changes do not false-conflict, while real same-key payload changes do.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Sequential conflict semantics are correct; the remaining issue is only the concurrent pre-receipt race above.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Failed or aborted saves do not leave blocking receipts

searchActions.result: Indexing exceptions return an error response before receipt storage at handlers/memory-save.ts:3531-3559, governance rollback returns before storage at handlers/memory-save.ts:3581-3602, and storage is guarded by shouldStoreMemorySaveReceipt at handlers/memory-save.ts:3606.

searchLedger.rationale: The narrowed guard in lib/storage/idempotency-receipts.ts:104-114 only accepts non-error responses with positive ids and statuses indexed/updated/deferred, so rejected/error/unchanged/duplicate paths do not create blocking receipts.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No reviewed failed/aborted path stores a receipt before completion.

searchActions.result: normalizeForHash recurses arrays at lib/storage/idempotency-receipts.ts:59-62, sorts object keys and strips client token keys at lib/storage/idempotency-receipts.ts:67-76, and hashes normalized JSON at lib/storage/idempotency-receipts.ts:81-84. Tests cover token stripping at tests/memory-idempotency-and-near-duplicate.vitest.ts:137-152 and key-order/undefined object fields plus changed payload conflict at tests/memory-idempotency-and-near-duplicate.vitest.ts:155-188.

searchLedger.rationale: For the reviewed object-key, client-token, undefined object field, and changed-payload cases, identical requests replay and changed payloads conflict rather than false-replay.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No normalization defect found in the covered cases.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Near-duplicate handling is not double-applied on replay or dedup returns

searchActions.result: Replay returns before indexing at handlers/memory-save.ts:3464-3465. Duplicate/unchanged returns happen before embedding/near-duplicate work at handlers/memory-save.ts:2304-2315 and handlers/memory-save.ts:2389-2399. recordNearDuplicateCheck is only reached for the committed new row at handlers/memory-save.ts:2713-2727.

searchLedger.rationale: A receipt replay does not run near-duplicate detection again, and duplicate/unchanged dedup paths short-circuit before the advisory write.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No double-handling or idempotency/near-duplicate conflict found.
